3: require 'zip'
4: 
5: class BackupService < BaseService
6:   include Payloadable
7:   include ContextHelper
8: 
9:   CHUNK_SIZE = 1.megabyte
10:   PLACEHOLDER = '!PLACEHOLDER!'
11: 
12:   STREAM_ACTOR = 'actor.json'
13:   STREAM_BOOKMARKS = 'bookmarks.json'
14:   STREAM_LIKES = 'likes.json'
15:   STREAM_OUTBOX = 'outbox.json'
16: 
17:   attr_reader :account, :backup
18: 
19:   def call(backup)
20:     @backup  = backup
21:     @account = backup.user.account
22: 
23:     build_archive!
24:   end
25: 
26:   private
27: 
28:   def build_outbox_json!(file)
29:     skeleton = serialize(collection_presenter(STREAM_OUTBOX, size: account.statuses.count), ActivityPub::CollectionSerializer)
30:     skeleton[:@context] = full_context
31:     skeleton[:orderedItems] = [PLACEHOLDER]
32:     skeleton = skeleton.to_json
33:     prepend, append = skeleton.split(PLACEHOLDER.to_json)
34: 
35:     file.write(prepend)
36: 
37:     account.statuses.with_includes.reorder(nil).find_in_batches.with_index do |statuses, batch|
38:       file.write(',') unless batch.zero?
39: 
40:       file.write(statuses.map do |status|
41:         serializer = status.reblog? ? ActivityPub::AnnounceNoteSerializer : ActivityPub::CreateNoteSerializer
42:         item = serialize_payload(status, serializer)
43:         item.delete(:@context)
44: 
45:         unless item[:type] == 'Announce' || item[:object][:attachment].blank?
46:           item[:object][:attachment].each do |attachment|
47:             attachment[:url] = Addressable::URI.parse(attachment[:url]).path.delete_prefix('/system/')
48:           end
49:         end
50: 
51:         item.to_json
52:       end.join(','))
53: 
54:       GC.start
55:     end
56: 
57:     file.write(append)
58:   end
59: 
60:   def build_archive!
61:     tmp_file = Tempfile.new(%w(archive .zip))
62: 
63:     build_zip_file(tmp_file)
64: 
65:     @backup.dump = ActionDispatch::Http::UploadedFile.new(tempfile: tmp_file, filename: archive_filename)
66:     @backup.processed = true
67:     @backup.save!
68:   ensure
69:     tmp_file.close
70:     tmp_file.unlink
71:   end
72: 
73:   def build_zip_file(file)
74:     Zip::File.open(file, create: true) do |zip|
75:       dump_outbox!(zip)
76:       dump_media_attachments!(zip)
77:       dump_likes!(zip)
78:       dump_bookmarks!(zip)
79:       dump_actor!(zip)
80:     end
81:   end
82: 
83:   def archive_filename
84:     "#{archive_id}.zip"
85:   end
86: 
87:   def archive_id
88:     [:archive, Time.current.to_fs(:number), SecureRandom.hex(16)].join('-')
89:   end
90: 
91:   def dump_media_attachments!(zipfile)
92:     MediaAttachment.attached.where(account: account).find_in_batches do |media_attachments|
93:       media_attachments.each do |m|
94:         path = m.file&.path
95:         next unless path
96: 
97:         path = path.gsub(%r{\A.*/system/}, '')
98:         path = path.gsub(%r{\A/+}, '')
99:         download_to_zip(zipfile, m.file, path)
100:       end
101: 
102:       GC.start
103:     end
104:   end
105: 
106:   def dump_outbox!(zipfile)
107:     zipfile.get_output_stream(STREAM_OUTBOX) do |io|
108:       build_outbox_json!(io)
109:     end
110:   end
111: 
112:   def dump_actor!(zipfile)
113:     actor = serialize(account, ActivityPub::ActorSerializer)
114: 
115:     actor[:icon][:url]  = "avatar#{File.extname(actor[:icon][:url])}"  if actor[:icon]
116:     actor[:image][:url] = "header#{File.extname(actor[:image][:url])}" if actor[:image]
117:     actor[:outbox]      = STREAM_OUTBOX
118:     actor[:likes]       = STREAM_LIKES
119:     actor[:bookmarks]   = STREAM_BOOKMARKS
120: 
121:     download_to_zip(zipfile, account.avatar, "avatar#{File.extname(account.avatar.path)}") if account.avatar.exists?
122:     download_to_zip(zipfile, account.header, "header#{File.extname(account.header.path)}") if account.header.exists?
123: 
124:     zipfile.get_output_stream(STREAM_ACTOR) do |io|
125:       io.write(actor.to_json)
126:     end
127:   end
128: 
129:   def dump_likes!(zipfile)
130:     skeleton = serialize(collection_presenter(STREAM_LIKES), ActivityPub::CollectionSerializer)
131: 
132:     skeleton.delete(:totalItems)
133:     skeleton[:orderedItems] = [PLACEHOLDER]
134:     skeleton = skeleton.to_json
135:     prepend, append = skeleton.split(PLACEHOLDER.to_json)
136: 
137:     zipfile.get_output_stream(STREAM_LIKES) do |io|
138:       io.write(prepend)
139: 
140:       favourite_statuses.find_in_batches.with_index do |statuses, batch|
141:         io.write(',') unless batch.zero?
142: 
143:         io.write(statuses.map do |status|
144:           ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(status).to_json
145:         end.join(','))
146: 
147:         GC.start
148:       end
149: 
150:       io.write(append)

1: # frozen_string_literal: true

3: class RevokeQuoteService < BaseService
4:   include Payloadable
5: 
6:   def call(quote)
7:     @quote = quote
8:     @account = quote.quoted_account
9: 
10:     @quote.reject!
11:     distribute_update!
12:     distribute_stamp_deletion!
13:   end
14: 
15:   private
16: 
17:   def distribute_update!
18:     return if @quote.status_id.nil?
19: 
20:     DistributionWorker.perform_async(@quote.status_id, { 'update' => true })
21:   end
22: 
23:   def distribute_stamp_deletion!
24:     # It is possible the quoted status has been soft-deleted.
25:     # In this case, `signed_activity_json` would fail, but we can just ignore
26:     # that, as we have already federated deletion.
27:     return if @quote.quoted_status.nil?
28: 
29:     ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(inboxes, limit: 1_000) do |inbox_url|
30:       [signed_activity_json, @account.id, inbox_url]
31:     end
32:   end
33: 
34:   def inboxes
35:     [
36:       @quote.status,
37:       @quote.quoted_status,
38:     ].compact.map { |status| StatusReachFinder.new(status, unsafe: true).inboxes }.flatten.uniq
39:   end
40: 
41:   def signed_activity_json
42:     @signed_activity_json ||= serialize_payload(@quote, ActivityPub::DeleteQuoteAuthorizationSerializer, signer: @account, always_sign: true, force_approval_id: true).to_json
43:   end
44: end

4:   include FormattingHelper
5:

8:   attributes :id, :created_at, :in_reply_to_id, :in_reply_to_account_id,
9:              :sensitive, :spoiler_text, :visibility, :language,

11:              :favourites_count, :quotes_count, :edited_at

14:   attribute :reblogged, if: :current_user?
15:   attribute :muted, if: :current_user?
16:   attribute :bookmarked, if: :current_user?
17:   attribute :pinned, if: :pinnable?
18:   has_many :filtered, serializer: REST::FilterResultSerializer, if: :current_user?
19: 
20:   attribute :content, unless: :source_requested?
21:   attribute :text, if: :source_requested?

40:   def quote

42:   end
